R25M.not_best_reason: bounded mechanics signal only; non-replayable and weak loss signal

R25P.not_best_reason: clear train loss decrease but moderate train/dev and train/heldout gaps

R25S.best_reason: best dev/heldout result so far and balanced weak-bucket sampling

R25V.not_best_reason: train loss slightly improved against R25S, but dev and heldout worsened

R25Y.not_best_reason: better than R25P/R25V but worse than R25S; does not justify immediate repeat

R25Z.role: R25Y analysis and phase-3 decision review

must_not_do: do not run training from R25AA
do not approve phase_4 scaled training
do not treat R25S or any pilot as a product model
do not commit checkpoints or ignored reports
do not add external APIs, backend inference, storage, named pretrained targets, LoRA, adapters, or fine-tuning as final strategy
